# Designed by Anthony — Business Tools Platform

> Purpose-built micro-SaaS tools for local service businesses. Built by ANTHONY. (designedbyanthony.com) and engineered in Rome, NY.

## Platform Overview

designedbyanthony.online is the tool suite companion to designedbyanthony.com. It hosts standalone web applications that help contractors, HVAC technicians, plumbers, electricians, roofers, landscapers, and other service professionals run their businesses more efficiently.

## Available Tools

### Construction Calculator ($29/mo)
Estimate material and labor costs in seconds. Concrete bags, lumber, shingles — whatever the job calls for.
- URL: https://calculator.designedbyanthony.online
- For: Contractors, estimators, and project managers

### Contact Form Builder ($49/mo)
Build a contact form in minutes and start getting leads from your website. No coding needed.
- URL: https://lead-form.designedbyanthony.online
- For: Any service business wanting more website leads

### Website Speed Test ($29/mo)
Weekly Core Web Vitals monitoring. Get alerts before slow pages hurt your Google rankings.
- URL: https://web-vitals.designedbyanthony.online
- For: Business owners who want to keep their site fast

### Local SEO Checker ($49/mo)
Run your business through Google's ranking checklist. Get a scored report with clear action items.
- URL: https://seo-audit.designedbyanthony.online
- For: Local service businesses that want to rank higher

### Follow-Up Email Writer ($79/mo)
Write personalized follow-up emails for every prospect. No CRM needed.
- URL: https://outreach.designedbyanthony.online
- For: Sales teams and business owners doing outbound outreach

### Service Area Map ($29/mo)
Show customers and Google exactly which towns you serve with an embeddable map.
- URL: https://service-area.designedbyanthony.online
- For: Multi-location or service-area businesses

### Website Speed Grader ($49/mo)
Grade your website on speed, SEO, and accessibility. Scan up to five pages at once.
- URL: https://lighthouse.designedbyanthony.online
- For: Web developers and business owners auditing their sites

## How It Works

1. Visit the tool you need
2. Use it for free (limited) or sign up for full access
3. Data persists to your dashboard at designedbyanthony.online/dashboard
4. All tools are authenticated via Clerk — one account, all tools

## Pricing

All tools are monthly subscriptions. Cancel any time. Prices range from $29/mo to $79/mo depending on the tool. Founding member pricing is available for early adopters.
